# Flock Pricing — Authoritative Tables

*Generated from `src/pricing/pricing.ts` · USD · USA clients only*

-----

## Apparel & Promotional

| Product | 1 | 5 | 25 | 100 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| T-Shirt (DTF) | $30 | $22 | $18 | $15 |
| Hat (Embroidered) | $35 | $25 | $20 | $16 |
| Tote Bag | $22 | $18 | $15 | $13 |
| Ceramic Mug (11oz) | $20 | $15 | $12 | $10 |
| DTF Transfer | $8 | $6 | $5 | $4 |
| Tumbler | $40 | $30 | $24 | $20 |
| Sky Dancer / Inflatable | $250 | $200 | $175 | $175 |
| Custom Flag | $45 | $45 | $45 | $45 |

-----

## Flat Print

| Product | 100 | 500 | 1000 | 2500 | 5000 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Business Cards (with design) | $45 | $112.5 | $150 | $225 | $375 |
| Business Cards (print only, art supplied) | — | — | $39 | — | — |
| Flyers 8.5×11 double-sided | $52.5 | $131.25 | $175 | $260 | $400 |
| Tabloid 11×17 double-sided | $97.5 | $243.75 | $325 | $475 | $750 |
| Brochure / Trifold | $85.5 | $213.75 | $285 | $420 | $675 |
| Stickers 2" circle | — | — | $90 | — | — |

Print runs come in the quantities shown. If a client asks for an in-between quantity,
quote the next tier up. Stickers: 2" circle only; other sizes → escalate to Dan.
Business Cards (print only): 1,000 minimum, no 100/500 sub-runs.

-----

## Large Format — per square foot

**Vinyl Banner (13oz) · Vinyl Mesh / Microperforated:**
Same tier table applies to both `banner_standard` and `vinyl_mesh_materials`.

| Sqft | Price/sqft |
|---|---|
| Under 25 | $6.00 |
| 25–99 | $5.50 |
| 100–299 | $5.00 |
| 300+ | $4.50 |

**UV resistance upcharge:** +$2/sqft post-print on banners or mesh.
Not urgency-scaled. Set `uv_resistant=true` in specs.
*Grommets and hem included on banners.*

-----

## Cut Vinyl

Base: $8/sqft · +$2/sqft per additional color/layer · Transfer tape included.
Minimum: $40. Urgency multiplier applies to base print cost.

-----

## Urgency Multipliers

| Turnaround | Multiplier |
|---|---|
| 1–3 business days | 1.5× |
| 4–7 business days | 1.2× |
| 8+ business days (standard) | 1.0× |

Apply urgency on top of the base price. Always mention the multiplier when quoting rush.

-----

## Deposit & Payment Terms

- **50% deposit** to begin — required before any work starts
- **50% balance** before delivery
- **Digital file only** (no print): $5 flat on any product
- **Revisions**: 3 free · $5 per additional round (block of 3)
- **Minimum quote**: $20 (physical; digital $5 flat is separate)

-----

## Products Requiring Dan Approval — Do Not Auto-Quote

For the following, tell the client: *"Let me put together an exact quote for you — I'll follow up shortly."* Then escalate.

- Indoor Illuminated Sign
- Exterior Flat Sign
- Exterior Illuminated Box Sign
- Channel Letters
- Monument / Pylon Sign
- Partial Vehicle Wrap
- Full Vehicle Wrap
- Social Media Package
- Custom Packaging
- Specialty Fabrication
- Feather Flag (sizes pending — escalate for quote)
